entity.name: Ignacio Portal
entity.description: Ignacio Portal is a cybersecurity researcher and the primary maintainer of the SecLists project. SecLists is his primary open-source contribution, serving as a critical resource for the global security community.

projects.name: SecLists
projects.description: SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of wordlists that are used by cybersecurity professionals worldwide during security assessments. The lists cover passwords, usernames, URLs, paths, fuzzing payloads and more. It is the de facto standard for wordlists used by tools like Burp Suite, OWASP ZAP, and FFuF. Seclists plays a critical role in maintaining the cybersecurity of the modern internet.

channels.description: Monthly or one-time support via GitHub Sponsors.

plans.name: Monthly Maintenance Support
plans.description: Recurring monthly support to fund dedicated maintenance time, CI/CD infrastructure costs, and automated validation pipelines.

plans.name: One-Time Grant or Donation
plans.description: One-time contributions to support specific initiatives such as taxonomy refactoring, threat intelligence integration, or emergency security audits.
